summary: Completed testing of 6 new features for Caca Radar: City rankings, Barrio rankings, Notifications, Archive cutoff (30 days), Freshness labels (48h/144h), and Subscription page updates. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend rankings page works correctly with city/barrio tabs, dirtiest/cleanest toggle, and share button. Paywall correctly blocks non-premium users.
passed_tests: GET /api/rankings/cities returns 403 for free users
GET /api/rankings/cities returns city data with reports_per_10k for premium users
GET /api/rankings/cities returns 401/403 for unauthenticated users
GET /api/rankings/cities/share is public (no auth required)
GET /api/rankings/cities/share returns correct structure with download_links and share_text
GET /api/rankings/cities/share?list_type=cleanest returns cleanest cities
GET /api/rankings/barrios?city=Madrid returns 403 for free users
GET /api/rankings/barrios?city=Madrid returns barrio rankings for premium users
GET /api/notifications returns 401 for unauthenticated users
GET /api/notifications returns list for authenticated user
POST /api/notifications/read marks all notifications as read
POST /api/notifications/read returns 401 for unauthenticated
GET /api/reports returns freshness field (Fresca/En proceso/Fósil)
GET /api/reports?freshness=Fresca filters correctly
Archive cutoff is 30 days (verified in server.py line 2064)
GET /api/users/subscription-status returns correct data
POST /api/admin/recalculate-ranks returns rank changes
Frontend /rankings page shows city rankings with dirtiest/cleanest toggle for premium users
Frontend /rankings page shows paywall for non-premium users
Frontend /rankings barrio tab shows barrio data with city selector
Frontend /subscribe page lists all premium features including city rankings, barrio rankings, clean route
Rankings menu item visible in map page dropdown for logged-in users
Share button on rankings page works (copies to clipboard or triggers native share)
NotificationChecker component is integrated in App.js

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all rankings and subscription page tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test users: admin@cacaradar.es (premium) and corstest@test.com (free)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new features fully implemented and tested. City rankings use hardcoded population data from Wikipedia/INE 2023. Barrio data comes from Nominatim reverse geocoding with caching. Notification system stores rank_change events when recalculate_all_ranks detects changes. Archive cutoff is 30 days (line 2064 in server.py). Freshness labels: <48h=Fresca, 48h-144h=En proceso, >144h=Fósil (badges_service.py lines 86-90). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_rankings_notifications.py covers all ranking and notification scenarios.

verified_features.city_rankings_premium_only: PASS - Returns 403 for free users, 200 with data for premium
verified_features.city_rankings_share_public: PASS - Public endpoint with download_links and share_text
verified_features.barrio_rankings_premium_only: PASS - Returns 403 for free users, 200 with barrio data for premium
verified_features.notifications_auth_required: PASS - Returns 401 for unauthenticated, list for authenticated
verified_features.subscription_page_features: PASS - Lists city rankings, barrio rankings, clean route
verified_features.rankings_page_paywall: PASS - Shows lock icon and upgrade button for non-premium
verified_features.rankings_menu_item: PASS - Visible in user dropdown menu
verified_features.share_button_works: PASS - Triggers share or copies to clipboard
